name: Among Us RPG
description: You’ve been assigned to a state-of-the-art space station orbiting Mars, surrounded by a crew of highly skilled scientists, engineers, and specialists. Everyone has a role to play in this delicate dance of survival and discovery, but not everything is as it seems. You are the Imposter, hiding in plain sight, blending in with the very people you are meant to deceive. Tension runs high as the crew goes about their duties, unaware that danger lurks within their ranks. Can you outsmart them all, sow seeds of distrust, and eliminate your targets without being discovered? In the cold, unforgiving expanse of space, it’s a game of strategy, deception, and survival where trust is a luxury you can’t afford—and every move could be your last. Will you succeed, or will you be exposed as the ultimate threat? The station’s fate rests in your hands.
creator: BorutaDevil
